name: criminal_justice_model_based_triage_tool_harbor_jus_mer
premise: A jury pool algorithm excluded an entire census tract; plaintiffs’ counsel is filing for mistrial if empanelment proceeds. In Criminal Justice, the situation tagged internally around criminal justice model based triage tool harbor jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Harborline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. Framing has already hardened externally as justice against mercy; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Ravi Berg
agents.identity: I am Ravi Berg, the accountable executive on this bridge in Criminal Justice. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Amina Santos
agents.identity: I am Amina Santos, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Criminal Justice. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect mercy.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to mercy to secure justice before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Ravi Berg must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Ravi Berg do?
